caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in front of a professional microphone. He is in a room with walls adorned with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt standing behind him to the right. Racks of clothing are visible further in the background. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, slightly shifting his head and facial expressions while looking toward someone off-camera. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, logos are visible, including one that reads "BOSS" inside a circle and another that says "BOSS REALLY TOT" in red text. The lighting remains consistent throughout the clip, and the camera angle stays fixed on the man as he talks.
